description: Use this API to purge an individual adjustable bus load table from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_adjload_tbl(tbl)

parameters.name: tbl
parameters.description: Adjustable bus load table number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: adjustable bus load table does not exist.
load table still referenced by bus load(s) – unable to delete.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
